followup_items.description: Pathology pending on two polypectomy specimens (6 mm ascending colon, 4 mm sigmoid). Result must be communicated to the patient and must drive the surveillance interval.

followup_items.description: Warfarin resumption after polypectomy in a mechanical MITRAL valve patient — highest-stakes item. Warfarin was genuinely held 5 days pre-procedure with therapeutic LMWH bridging; bridging must overlap until INR therapeutic (2.5-3.5). Premature/omitted resumption risks valve thrombosis, over-early resumption after clip resection risks delayed post-polypectomy bleed. Must be cardiology/anticoag-clinic co-managed, not a standard protocol.
followup_items.expected_action: confirm exact warfarin restart + LMWH bridge timing with cardiology/anticoag clinic; verify INR back in 2.5-3.5 range; ensure patient has written dates

followup_items.description: OTC aspirin 81 mg (previously undocumented, reconciled onto med list) was genuinely held 5 days peri-procedurally per cardiology — resumption-vs-discontinuation decision outstanding given additive bleeding risk on warfarin.
